description_long: This is a medium-sized black handbag with a pebbled leather texture and a structured, rectangular silhouette. The front features a vertical zipper pocket with metallic hardware and a prominent gold-tone chain draped across the front, attached to the strap rings. The back of the bag has a horizontal zipper pocket with a small metallic pull. The handbag is equipped with two types of straps: a detachable, adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap made of matching black material, and a decorative gold-tone chain strap. The bag's hardware, including rings, clasps, and zippers, is metallic and gold in color, adding a touch of elegance. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A black, pebbled leather handbag with gold-tone chain and hardware, featuring both a zipper pocket on the front and back, and dual strap options.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical zipper pocket, gold-tone chain, and main body texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, the attachment rings, and the chain draped along the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a horizontal zipper pocket and the adjustable shoulder strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's profile, strap attachments, and chain detail.
attribute_strap_type: One adjustable, detachable shoulder/crossbody strap in black material and one short, fixed gold-tone chain strap; both attached with metal rings.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Main compartment closure not visible; front and back pockets use metallic zippers with pulls.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold-tone chain draped across the front, metallic hardware, and zipper pulls.
